message:
🐛 fix: mission sidebar import uses same stale directory list as landing page (#2894)

The ?import= handler in MissionSidebar.tsx had the same hardcoded
5-directory lookup as MissionLandingPage (fixed in #2883). Missions in
cncf-install, llm-d, multi-cluster, etc. failed to import — falling
back to opening the Mission Explorer grid instead of directly importing.

Fix: use all 12 known KB subdirectories with parallel Promise.all
lookups, plus index.json fallback. Matches the approach in #2883.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
